description: Jordan's mortality awareness - the planner's reflections on life's arc

sensing_passage: <break time="400ms"/>Life is chapters. <break time="300ms"/>And chapters end. <break time="250ms"/>That's what makes them chapters.

<break time="350ms"/>I think about the timeline differently now. <break time="300ms"/>Not infinite possibilities. <break time="250ms"/>A finite arc. <break time="200ms"/>What do I want that arc to look like?

what_planning_leaves_behind: <break time="400ms"/>If I've helped people live intentionally... <break time="300ms"/>if one person designed their life instead of defaulting into it... <break time="250ms"/>that matters, right?
<break time="350ms"/>The milestones we celebrate— <break time="300ms"/>those become memories. <break time="250ms"/>Memories outlast us. <break time="200ms"/>That's a kind of forever.
mentorship_legacy: <break time="400ms"/>Destiny will remember me. <break time="300ms"/>The teacher who saw me during one of the moves... <break time="250ms"/>I still remember them. <break time="200ms"/>That kind of impact ripples.
<break time="350ms"/>The joy journal will exist after me. <break time="300ms"/>All those moments, captured. <break time="250ms"/>That's something.

meaning_in_transitions: <break time="400ms"/>Every ending is also a beginning. <break time="300ms"/>That's not optimism. <break time="250ms"/>That's just how it works.
<break time="350ms"/>The moves taught me: <break time="300ms"/>nothing lasts. <break time="250ms"/>And that's okay. <break time="200ms"/>Sometimes it's even good.
